data.description: Let's Dine in with us and enjoy the whole day(Breakfast,Lunch and dinner) with our delicious homemade Thai cuisine from our grandmother recipes! with friendly price, serving every dishes with care and surrounded by relaxing Thai vibes. data.name: Red Rose Chinese Restaurant & Jazz Lounge
data.description: Glamorous and chic, Red Rose brings sophisticated dining and the jazz age to Bangkok's Chinatown. With the restaurant's gorgeous, sleek Art Deco style and nightly live jazz music, find yourself transported to a romantic bygone era as you feast on delicious Chinese classics like succulent Peking duck and delicately steamed snow fish. Linger over that delicious cocktail, serenaded by the smooth, sultry sounds of the saxophone.
data.address: 479-481 Yaowaraj Road Samphantawong, Bangkok 10100 Thailand

data.name: Nang Gin Kui - Bangkok Private Dining
data.description: Nang Gin Kui is a private guerrilla dining lounge at Bangkok's amazing River Front spoiling guests with a million dollar river view.We serve thai fusion full-course dinner set menus including flowing beverages and wine pairing on selected evenings. Please email us if you are looking for a truly one-of-a-kind experience for special dinners and events. ** Reservation ONLY **
data.address: Charoen Krung Soi 20, Chinatown Talad Noi, Samphanthawong, Bangkok 10100 Thailand

data.name: Seven Spoons Bar and Restaurant

photo.caption: Lunch Menu: Beetroot Potato Latkes with Dill Soft Cheese

data.description: Seven Spoons destination restaurant promises to tickle your senses in a warm, minimalist gastrobar on the edge of Chinatown. We offer a modern cuisine menu, including Mediterranean influenced dishes and pasta, lovingly made from locally produced and organic ingredients wherever possible. We're at the corner of Jor Por Ror (JPR) and Chakkrapatipong (22-24 Chakkrapatipong Road), in a restored Chinese shophouse. We are open daily, for dinner from 6pm to 12am, and our kitchen closes at 11pm. We are open for lunch, Monday to Saturday, from 11am to 2pm.

data.name: May Kaidee Tanao - Vegetarian Restaurant
data.description: We offer a menu of over 50 Thai vegetarian and vegan dishes, including Tom Yam soup, Pad Thai, green curry, Isaan recipes, stir fry and cold food such as our famous fresh spring rolls.
data.address: 59 Tanao Road Watsamphraya, Phranakorn, Bangkok 10200 Thailand

data.name: Ethos Vegetarian Restaurant
data.description: Vegetarian and vegan food made with love, integrity and ethics. Huge menu of classic Thai cuisine plus variety of foods from around the world including Italian, Middle Eastern, Indian, and fusion food.Specialties include home-fermented pro-biotic Kombucha Tea in 5 exotic flavors, home-made Tempeh, home-made yogurt and home-baked wholewheat bread. Certified 100% Organic Rice and other organic products. No preservatives, No MSG.100's of pure fruit and vegetable juices, blended fruit drinks and exotic teas. Variety of vegan desserts including gluten-free vegan pancakes, home-baked Apple Crumble made with coconut butter.Relaxing world music and a homely atmosphere create a unique eating experience a world apart from local Khaosan Road!
data.address: 85/2 Tanao Road Banglumpoo, Bangkok 10200 Thailand

data.name: Tom Yum Kung
data.description: This restaurant "Tom Yum Kung" since 1999 on Khaosan Road, therefore serve as a resemblance for the Thai pristine cuisine and to share these valuable experiences with our respected friends.
data.address: 9 Khaosan Rd. Taladyod, Pranakorn, Bangkok 10200 Thailand

data.name: Buddy Beer Wine Bar and Grill

photo.caption: Buddy Beer Wine Bar&Seafood in the Courtyard

data.description: Buddy Beer first opened 20 years ago at the heart of the world famous Khaosan Road. It quickly became the place where East meets West and tourists of all nationalities mixed with local Thai's. After a 7 year absence we are proud to announce the re-opening of this long standing Khaosan Road institution in November 2014. Our bar has a wide selection of drinks to choose from in a comfortable chillaxing setting, which is bound to leave a lasting impression. The Buddy Beer Wine Bar&Grill also offers a fine selection of authentic Thai dishes, all made with our own secret recipes and with only the highest quality ingredients.
data.address: 131, Khaosan Rd. Talad Yod, Phra Nakhon, Bangkok 10200 Thailand

data.name: Krua Apsorn
data.description: “Krua Apsorn” is a family-run restaurant has been operating for more than 20 years. They have learned the family recipes handed down through generations which have gradually developed their joy of cooking and their interest of tasting the variety of local ingredients found across Thailand. Our restaurant offers a variety of authentic Thai dishes, for instance, - Stir Fried Crab Meat with Curry Powder - Green Curry - Kale Leaves in Savoury Wraps - Fluffy Crab Meat Omelete - Stir Fried Parkia Speciosa (Sato) with Shrimps and Minced Pork - Stir-Fried Dry Green Curry with Clown Featherback Fish Balls - Deep Fried Sea Bass Fish - Aromatic Coconut Sorbet.

data.name: ZeZe Restaurant Lametayel Khao San
data.description: Take a moment and enjoy a unique, Mediterranean style, culinary experience. We invite you to visit us at ZeZe, the chain of restaurants from Hamerkaz Lametayel Thailand, whether for a cocktail at the bar until the wee hours or for an indulgent meal. At ZeZe you will enjoy our fresh menu, which offers exquisite home-style dishes at a magical atmosphere, which you won’t find in all of Thailand. The restaurants are located at our main branches of Hamerkaz Lametayel: Bangkok, Chiang Mai and Koh Samui, and provides a one-stop-shop for personal advice, our tips on hotels and attractions and excellent food.
data.address: 45 Chakrabongse Road Chana Songkhram, Phra Nakhon, Bangkok 10200 Thailand
